summary: Clean, crisp soundboard excerpt of a brief show that fans love for its banter and audio fidelity.
review: The recording delivers exceptionally clear and balanced sound—reviewers repeatedly call it “clean, clear & crisp.” While the set is notably short, listeners appreciate the high‑quality capture and the lively onstage banter, even though they wish they had the full performance.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviewers gave 4–5 stars, praising the audio quality and overall enjoyment despite the incomplete length; the strong recording quality lifts the rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Multiple comments describe the source as clean, clear, crisp, and well‑balanced with no reported distortion or noise.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The excerpt is short, leaving listeners wanting more of the show; however, the captured portion flows naturally and features engaging banter.
